card_description: The flowing outward of divine reality through successive levels, from the One to matter.
full_description:
The flowing outward of divine reality through successive levels, from the One to matter.

**Category:** Neoplatonism / Gnosticism

**Key segment contexts:**
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick contrasts Gnosticism (external grace) with Neoplatonism (self-attainment), concluding that the 1974 experience was a "zygote" formation between the human "egg" and cosmic "spermatika." He rein...
- (circa 1975-1976) Dick develops the "Steuben Cup" myth: humans are "creating angels" who were given the "draught of Lethe" and are now laboring to recreate the divine model (Christ) from memory. He identifies his 19...
- (September 12, 1976) Dick writes to Dorothy summarizing his 3-74 experience (the "conversion year"). He introduces the term "VALIS" (Vast Active Living Intelligence System), details his role in toppling Nixon through l...
